title: A Fair World

studyTools.title: Unit 10 Study Tool
studyTools.blurb: Vocab quiz (38 words), conditionals practice & German traps.

speakingLines: It isn't fair that some farmers earn so little.
Fair Trade guarantees farmers a fair price for their crops.
We should treat everyone equally and with respect.
If we buy Fair Trade coffee, farmers earn more money.
Small actions can make a real difference over time.
We have a responsibility to look after the planet.
